mapper.update:
update stock_position_day
day = #{day,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
vol = #{vol,jdbcType=INTEGER},
avg_cost = #{avgCost,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
close_price = #{closePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

term_income = #{termIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
total_expend = #{totalExpend,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
total_income = #{totalIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update stock_position_day set day = #{day,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, vol = #{vol,jdbcType=INTEGER}, avg_cost = #{avgCost,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, close_price = #{closePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, total_profit = #{totalProfit,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, day_profit = #{dayProfit,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, term_trade_times = #{termTradeTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, term_open_time = #{termOpenTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, term_expend = #{termExpend,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, term_income = #{termIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, total_expend = #{totalExpend,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, total_income = #{totalIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
